title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Indigo Paints

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Indigo Paints
jsonLd.description:
Indigo Paints is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ghaziabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Indigo Paints:
Indigo Paints is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indigo Paints!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
